verses.text: God commands the offerings be kept in their due season. In season. Worship has its times.
God commands the offerings be kept in their due season. In season. Worship has its times.
The daily burnt offering, a lamb each morning and evening. Daily. Worship is continual.
The daily burnt offering, a lamb each morning and evening. Daily. Worship is continual.
The daily burnt offering, a lamb each morning and evening. Daily. Worship is continual.
The drink offering accompanies it. The drink. Each offering is complete.
The drink offering accompanies it. The drink. Each offering is complete.
The drink offering accompanies it. The drink. Each offering is complete.
The sabbath offering is doubled. Sabbath. The day is honoured with more.
The sabbath offering is doubled. Sabbath. The day is honoured with more.
The monthly offering at the new moon. Monthly. Each month is marked to God.
The monthly offering at the new moon. Monthly. Each month is marked to God.
The monthly offering at the new moon. Monthly. Each month is marked to God.
The monthly offering at the new moon. Monthly. Each month is marked to God.
The monthly offering at the new moon. Monthly. Each month is marked to God.
The passover and its offerings. Passover. Redemption is remembered.
The passover and its offerings. Passover. Redemption is remembered.
The passover and its offerings. Passover. Redemption is remembered.
The passover and its offerings. Passover. Redemption is remembered.
The meat offering accompanies the feast. With bread. Worship is full.
The meat offering accompanies the feast. With bread. Worship is full.
The meat offering accompanies the feast. With bread. Worship is full.
These are offered through the seven days of unleavened bread. Seven days. The feast is kept with worship.
These are offered through the seven days of unleavened bread. Seven days. The feast is kept with worship.
These are offered through the seven days of unleavened bread. Seven days. The feast is kept with worship.
The feast of weeks brings its offerings. Firstfruits. The harvest is offered to God.
The feast of weeks brings its offerings. Firstfruits. The harvest is offered to God.
The feast of weeks brings its offerings. Firstfruits. The harvest is offered to God.
The lambs and drink offerings complete it. Complete. Nothing is lacking in worship.
